title: sorghum camporum
intro: Sorghum camporum, also known as broom sorghum or silver broom sorghum, is a type of perennial grass native to the grasslands of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sorghum camporum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Sorghum camporum include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems.
